project.name: Inventory System MVP
project.description: Mobile inventory system with AI-powered camera scanning for perishable goods identification and counting

inventory_screen.description: Main screen showing inventory table and scan button

camera_screen.description: Full screen camera for capturing perishable goods

confirmation_modal.description: Shows AI-identified items for staff confirmation before saving

actions.confirm: save to database, close modal, update inventory table

endpoints.description: Add new inventory items after confirmation

ai_integration.prompt: Analyze this image and identify all perishable goods visible. For each item return: name, count/quantity, and estimated shelf life in days. Return response in JSON format only: [{ 'name': string, 'quantity': number, 'shelf_life_days': number }]

core_flow: 1. Staff opens app and sees inventory table
4. Staff captures photo of perishable goods
5. Image sent to Claude Haiku API
6. Claude returns identified items with quantity and shelf life
7. Confirmation modal shows results to staff
9. On confirm, items saved to PostgreSQL via Express.js API
10. Inventory table updates with new items
notes: No expiration label OCR for now
No custom model training for now
Phone and PC must be on same WiFi network
Shelf life provided by Claude API, fallback to manual input if not provided
